title: hieracium divisum subsp. laevifrons
intro: Hieracium divisum subsp. laevifrons is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) commonly known as Hawkweed. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, wounds, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Hieracium divisum subsp. laevifrons can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
